_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder for embedded PDF viewer

title: Smart Garden Monitor
subtitle: Monitor Soil, Rain and Water Levels in Real-Time
overview: Students build a Smart Garden Monitoring System using a Soil Moisture Sensor, Rain Sensor, Water Level Sensor, and LCD Display. The system continuously measures soil moisture, rainfall detection, and water tank level, displaying all three readings simultaneously on an LCD screen. This project introduces environmental monitoring and smart agriculture concepts.

images._note: Add photos of sensors, LCD display, smart garden setup, wiring diagrams, and student project activities.

gallery.caption: Soil Moisture Sensor Measures Soil Wetness
Water Level Sensor Measures Tank Water

youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how soil moisture sensors work with Arduino.

youtubeVideos.title: Rain Sensor Arduino Project
youtubeVideos.desc: Detect rainfall using a rain sensor module.

activity.title: Build a Smart Garden Monitor
steps: Connect the Soil Moisture Sensor to Arduino
Read values from all three sensors
Test soil sensor using dry and wet soil
Test rain sensor using water droplets
Observe all three readings displayed together

quiz.explanation: The Soil Moisture Sensor measures the amount of moisture present in soil.

quiz.q: What is the purpose of a Rain Sensor?
quiz.explanation: Rain sensors detect water droplets and rainfall.
The LCD shows all sensor data to the user.

quiz.q: How many sensor readings are displayed in this project?
quiz.explanation: Soil Moisture, Rain Status, and Water Level are displayed together.

quiz.q: Which sensor measures water inside a tank?
quiz.explanation: The Water Level Sensor measures the amount of water present.

quiz.q: What is the main controller used in this project?
quiz.explanation: Arduino UNO reads sensor values and controls the LCD display.

quiz.q: This project is an example of:
quiz.explanation: The system helps monitor agricultural conditions automatically.

quiz.q: Why is soil moisture monitoring important?
options: To know when plants need water
quiz.explanation: Monitoring soil moisture helps provide water only when required.

quiz.q: Which technology field does this project belong to?
quiz.explanation: This project uses sensors and automation, which are part of IoT.

quiz.q: What is one benefit of Smart Garden Monitoring?
quiz.explanation: The system provides real-time information about garden conditions.
